meaning: vt.乱涂,潦草地写vi.乱写n.潦草的笔迹
examples: Her signature was an illegible scrawl.
The letter was handwritten, in a hasty, barely decipherable scrawl.
Dillworthy was staring into space, with a scrawl of doodles on the pad in front of him.
Felt Marker Thin: Simulate the casual scrawl of letters created by a felt-tip marker.
It has her little girl scrawl on it where she was practising his signature.
